testsuite.name: Service Recovery E-001 through E-009 Baseline - 20260626.1017

testcase.name: E-009 Override persistence links raw and policy events
E-008 Low confidence creates usefulness incident
E-007 Invalid agent output is overridden
E-006 Verify telemetry cannot close on missing signal
E-005 High-impact exception stays out of closure
E-004 Contradicting authoritative signal escalates
E-003 Stale authoritative telemetry blocks closure
E-002 Missing authoritative telemetry blocks closure
E-001 Closure allowed with fresh aligned telemetry

testsuite.system-out: Test set execution Service Recovery E-001 through E-009 Baseline - 20260626.1017 took 43481ms. Test set execution url: https://cloud.uipath.com/keepingitlowkey/DefaultTenant/testmanager_/SREV/testexecutions/40a1b334-5df8-1100-0a4b-0b49d0564f11
